component.name: NextApp
component.summary: Personal organizer based on the GTD method

description.p: NextApp is a personal organizer for desktop and mobile built around the Getting Things Done method. It keeps projects, actions, calendars, and reviews in a native Qt application with optional backend sync.
The application is intended for users who want a native cross-platform organizer instead of a web app, while keeping local data storage and the option to run their own backend.
